Name: FAnimNode_LookAt
Description: Simple controller that make a bone to look at the point or another bone

Variables.Name: BoneToModify
Variables.Description: Name of bone to control. This is the main bone chain to modify from.

Variables.Name: LookAtBone_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Target Bone to look at - You can use  LookAtLocation if you need offset from this point. That location will be used in their local space.

Variables.Name: LookAtTarget
Variables.Description: Target socket to look at. Used if LookAtBone is empty. - You can use  LookAtLocation if you need offset from this point. That location will be used in their local space.

Variables.Name: LookAtLocation
Variables.Description: Target Offset. It's in world space if LookAtBone is empty or it is based on LookAtBone or LookAtSocket in their local space

Variables.Name: LookAtAxis_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Look at axis, which axis to align to look at point

Variables.Name: CustomLookAtAxis_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Custom look up axis in local space. Only used if LookAtAxis==EAxisOption::Custom

Variables.Name: bUseLookUpAxis
Variables.Description: Whether or not to use Look up axis

Variables.Name: LookUpAxis_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Look up axis in local space

Variables.Name: CustomLookUpAxis_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Custom look up axis in local space. Only used if LookUpAxis==EAxisOption::Custom

Variables.Name: LookAtClamp
Variables.Description: Look at Clamp value in degree - if you're look at axis is Z, only X, Y degree of clamp will be used
